query: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool repair status latest news June July 2026, algae paint peeling, is the pool fully repaired, lawsuit status
answer:
I've completed my research on the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool repair status. Here's the summary:

**Bottom line (as of July 10, 2026): The pool is NOT fully repaired.** It has been drained for a **third time in three months** and remains visibly green.

**Algae:** Persistent green algae blooms have recurred despite a ~$1.7M nanobubbler remediation system. Researchers identified the algae as harmless and said the bloom was unsurprising for a shallow, warm, standing-water pool in summer.

**Paint peeling:** The blue polyurea coating began peeling less than two weeks after the early-June completion. Peeling/"peeled sealant" issues persisted into July. Burgum/Trump attribute the damage to vandalism (a claimed "350-foot gash"), but no supporting evidence has been publicly presented despite repeated media requests.

**Lawsuit:** The Cultural Landscape Foundation's suit (filed May 11, 2026, before Judge Carl J. Nichols, alleging NHPA/NEPA violations) remains **ongoing**. The court did NOT grant a TRO/injunction before the initial June 3 resurfacing was completed.

**Cost/contractor:** Total ~$16 million (roughly 8x the original estimate). Repairs awarded to the same no-bid contractor (Atlantic Industrial Coatings); Burgum declined to specify repair costs.

Full prose synthesis, key facts, sources, and quantitative data points have been submitted via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: Trump's Reflecting Pool Revamp Drags On: Drained For The 3rd Time
sources.snippet: Drained for the third time in as many months Friday; the pool remains green as algae blooms and peeled sealant extend the makeover past two months.

sources.title: Reflecting Pool being drained – again – as Trump administration tries once more to fix landmark
sources.snippet: Crews began draining the pool Sunday, per Burgum, for the second time in three months, after July 4 fireworks.

sources.title: Crews draining the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool again as part of troubled revamp
sources.snippet: Trump's problem-plagued renovation pushes well past his initial July 4 deadline.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool Repairs Awarded to Same No-Bid Contractor
sources.snippet: Repairs handled by Atlantic Industrial Coatings, the same firm that won the original no-bid contract; Burgum claimed vandalism caused the damage.

sources.title: Timeline: Trump's 2026 Reflecting Pool renovation project
sources.snippet: Timeline of delays, persistent green algae, and added costs bringing total to ~$16 million.

sources.title: Beautification Out of the (American Flag) Blue: The Lawsuit That Attempted to Halt the Reflecting Pool Makeover
sources.snippet: Judge Carl J. Nichols did not rule on the TRO/PI before completion; lawsuit remains ongoing; project cost over $16M.

sources.title: 'Permanent repair' to Reflecting Pool to come around July 4, Trump says
sources.snippet: Trump announced draining around July 4 for permanent repair; six arrested; no evidence provided for vandalism claims.

sources.title: Algae clouded Trump's vision for the Reflecting Pool. But scientists aren't surprised
sources.snippet: Scientists say algae bloom in warm, shallow standing water was unsurprising.

sources.title: Blue material peeling off bottom of Reflecting Pool, days after costly renovation
sources.snippet: CNN observed a flap of blue material partially detached from the pool bottom days after refilling.

sources.title: Lawsuit Filed to Halt Painting Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
sources.snippet: May 11, 2026 emergency lawsuit filed on behalf of The Cultural Landscape Foundation and CEO Charles A. Birnbaum.

sources.title: Firm that worked on past Reflecting Pool renovation passed on Trump project after deeming it 'unfeasible'
sources.snippet: A prior renovation firm declined due to the July 4 deadline and blue-bottom requirement.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
sources.snippet: In 2026 the pool was resurfaced with a blue polyurea coating and a nanobubbler filtration system was added.
